📁 Windows Icon Archive
_
□
✕

Windows Icon Archive

Icons extracted from Windows system files — shell32.dll, imageres.dll, progman.exe, moricons.dll, and more.
5,652 icons from Windows 95 through Windows 11, organized by source DLL.

Go to: ▶ Windows 95 (878) ▶ Windows 98 (635) ▶ Windows 2000 (275) ▶ Windows XP (238) ▶ Windows Vista (463) ▶ Windows 7 (1,086) ▶ Windows 8.1 (721) ▶ Windows 10 (663) ▶ Windows 11 (693)
Sources: trapd00r/win95-winxp_icons (910) · React95/React95 (727) · Eggy115/Icons (151) · visnalize/resources (561) · bartekl1/WindowsResources (3,303)
